structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-12-1 Nevada Worker Advantage Program Available Today!
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-12-01 07:49:20-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

The Nevada Housing Division Worker Advantage Program will open to reservations today, December 1st, 2025. The program was created exclusively for Nevada’s essential workers, which includes teachers and school support staff, public safety employees, construction laborers, and healthcare personnel. Please see the attached Capital Markets announcement for additional details. 

Channel: Banked

Product Type: Down Payment Assistance

 Guidelines <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/EhJNAzggGfFHoJanFR4Z2agB74fxwDy_b8bkeoWSUtVcng?e=CvMErI> 

 Marketing <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/EhM-DjUePlFJnXjAUBDnl5IBN_aKu43tXKSL7NZin-ktmQ?e=TTa7op> 

IMPORTANT NOTES

*	Lock requests must be submitted to Lock Desk; Reservations open at 9 a.m. (Mountain time).  
*	This offering is a subset of the Home is Possible program- please utilize the HIP templates and CM codes (CFBNV30, FFBNV30, VFBNV30, UFBNV30).

	*	A separate Encompass file is not required for the DPA.

ATTACHMENTS

*	Lender Processing Information (includes addendum specifying occupation details)
*	Marketing
*	Program AMI limits

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

Contact Us:

Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>         Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com>         Product Department <mailto:productdept@novahomeloans.com>
